deadline.days: {days, plural, =0 {due today} one {# day left} other {# days left}}
deadline.overdue: {days, plural, one {# day overdue} other {# days overdue}}

list.title: Tenders
list.description: Track every tender from detection to award.
list.emptyFilteredDescription: Try a different status filter, or clear it to see the full pipeline.
list.emptyDescription: Tenders detected from portals or added manually will show up here.

detail.notFound: This tender does not exist or is not in your organization.

lifecycle.title: Lifecycle
lifecycle.description: Move this tender to its next valid state. Transitions are enforced by the shared state machine and audited.

transition.noPermission: You don't have permission to move this tender.
transition.submitHint: Ready to submit? Use the Submission card below — it enforces the approval + QC gate and records the proof.

deadlineRisk.title: Deadline at risk
deadlineRisk.description: Open tenders within the T-2 submission window (or overdue), most urgent first. n8n escalates these up the L4→L3→L2 chain.
deadlineRisk.empty: Nothing at deadline risk right now.

new.title: New tender
new.description: Register a tender. It starts in NOT_STARTED; move it through the lifecycle from its detail page.

edit.title: Edit tender
edit.description: Update tender details. Status changes happen via transitions, not here.

assignee.title: Assignee
assignee.dialogDescription: Assign this tender to a person in your organization. Any existing assignment is superseded.

contributors.title: Revenue attribution
contributors.description: Who contributed to this tender, by role. Validation is auto-detected from the pricing approver & submitter; add the rest.

approval.title: Customer Approval
approval.description: Submission stays blocked until the customer's approval is recorded — any channel counts (email, WhatsApp, call).
approval.recordedBody: Submission is unblocked for this tender.
approval.missingBody: This tender cannot be submitted until an approval is recorded.
approval.requestDescription: Open a pending customer-approval request. The decision is recorded separately once the customer responds.
approval.requestEvidencePlaceholder: Link or note — e.g. email thread URL, or 'sent pricing pack via WhatsApp 2026-05-30'
approval.decideDescription: Attach the proof of the customer's decision. Any channel counts — paste a link or describe the call.
approval.decideEvidencePlaceholder: Link or note — e.g. 'phone 2026-05-30, confirmed by Frau Müller'

submission.title: Submission
submission.description: Submit on the portal (human), then record the proof here. The gate — customer approval + conditional QC — is enforced before submission.
submission.submittedBody: Submission proof is on record below.
submission.readyBody: All gates cleared. Record the portal proof to complete submission.
submission.qcRequestDescription: Open a quality-check review for this tender. A senior reviewer records the decision; submission stays blocked until QC is approved.
submission.qcNotePlaceholder: What should the reviewer focus on?
submission.qcOpenError: Could not open the QC review.
submission.qcDecideDescription: Approve or reject the quality check. Attach a note or link as evidence.
submission.qcEvidencePlaceholder: QC notes, checklist link, reviewer name…
submission.qcApprovedToast: QC approved — submission unblocked (if other gates pass).
submission.qcDecideError: Could not record the QC decision.
submission.recordSubmissionDescription: Paste the portal confirmation (receipt id, link, or a note). This logs the immutable evidence and moves the tender to Submitted.
submission.proofPlaceholder: e.g. DTVP receipt #A1B2C3, or 'submitted via Service-Bund 2026-05-31 09:12'
submission.recordingFiles: Recording {count, plural, one {# file} other {# files}}: {files}
submission.noDocuments: No documents attached — the receipt will record an empty file list.
submission.proofError: Enter the submission proof (a portal receipt link or note).
submission.recordedToast: Submission recorded — tender moved to Submitted.

documents.title: TYPE 1 Documents
documents.description: Source tender documents. OCR runs in a later phase.
documents.uploadDescription: Attach a TYPE 1 source document (PDF, image, Word/Excel, or XML).

pricing.title: Pricing workbench
pricing.notFound: This tender does not exist or is not in your organization.

lines.title: Line items (LV)
lines.description: Each line shows the engine's suggested price, confidence and evidence signal. Expand a row to review and add price evidence.
lines.empty: No line items yet. Add the first LV position to begin pricing.
lines.useSuggestedTitle: Set unit price to the suggested price

rfq.title: Supplier RFQs
rfq.description: Ask suppliers to quote lines that need real evidence; replies come back as supplier quotes that turn lines GREEN.
rfq.empty: No RFQs sent yet. Use “Request quotes” to ask suppliers for prices.
rfq.dialogDescription: Email an RFQ to suppliers via Hermes. Replies are recorded as supplier quotes and back the lines GREEN.
rfq.noSuppliers: No suppliers yet. Add suppliers in the registry first.
rfq.messagePlaceholder: Context for the suppliers (deadline, delivery, etc.)
rfq.sentToast: {count, plural, one {RFQ sent to # supplier.} other {RFQ sent to # suppliers.}}
rfq.failedWithDetail: RFQ recorded, but the Hermes webhook failed: {detail}.
rfq.failed: RFQ recorded, but the Hermes webhook failed.

finalize.title: Finalize pricing?
finalize.description: This locks the pricing as FINAL and moves the tender to Customer pricing. Final price is <amount>{price}</amount>.
finalize.finalizedToast: Pricing finalized — tender moved to Customer pricing.

addLine.title: Add line item
addLine.description: Add a position to the LV. The unit price (EP) drives the line total (GP = qty × EP), computed server-side.
addLine.numberError: Unit price must be a number.

bidEp.numberError: Unit price must be a number.

evidence.title: Price evidence
evidence.empty: No price evidence yet. Add an observation to back this line.

addObservation.title: Add price observation
addObservation.description: Record evidence for this line. The highest-trust source sets the suggested price; supplier quotes turn the line GREEN.

assist.askClaudeTitle: Ask Claude for a price estimate
assist.title: Claude price-assist
assist.notConfigured: Claude price-assist isn't configured. Set ANTHROPIC_API_KEY on the API to enable AI suggestions.
assist.lowConfidence: Low confidence — treat this as a rough placeholder and seek a real supplier quote.
assist.recordedAs: Recorded as an AI estimate — the line stays unbacked (RED) until a real quote backs it.
assist.recordedToast: Recorded Claude estimate on the line.
